creator: jp_ambriz@hotmail.com
text:
After updating cmake from 2.8.12.1_4 to 3.0.1 qtcreator can no longer find the executable.

The CMake Wizard dialog says "No CMake executable was found in the path."

Even when the path /usr/local/bin/cmake is set through the dialog or in Tools->Options->Build & Run->Cmake
